meta.label: path
meta.content: A linear travel feature: road, highway, trail, sea route, flight corridor.

kind.description: road | highway | trail | sea_route | flight_corridor | river | other

waypoints.description: Slugs of locations the path passes through

_provenance.rationale: Renamed from `route`; `path` reads better and pairs cleanly with `location` (point) and `region` (area).
